ugc.sectionSubtitle: Mortgage-native metrics that separate winners from the field—briefings, TopTiering®, and pipeline visibility built for lenders who demand precision.

items.headline: Cohi Insights
items.title: Cohi Insights
items.caption: AI-curated executive briefings by urgency—Critical, Needs Attention, What's Working, Context & Trends. See what moves the needle before it shows up in P&L.

items.headline: The Pareto Visualization:
items.title: Revenue by LO: The Pareto
items.caption: Identify who carries the load—e.g., 9 loan officers carrying 44. Top/Second/Bottom tier breakdown reveals hidden value and concentration risk.

items.headline: The Daily Briefing:
items.title: Daily Briefing
items.caption: Revenue insights and pipeline alerts on one screen; MBA market data and refinance activity on the other. Intelligence before the first call.

items.headline: Closings & Fallout Forecast
items.title: Fallout & Closing Intelligence
items.caption: Track loans at risk of falling out, monitor closing timelines, and surface pipeline slippage early. Intervene when it matters—not after the quarter closes.

outcomes.title: Why Cohi?
outcomes.tagline: Your Lender DNA. Your Data. Your Unique Way.
outcomes.signalsBody: The industry doesn't need more dashboards — it needs answers. Cohi provides clear prioritized signals — no noise — trained to your business model, your data, your way. Clear signals for you to make effective decisions.
outcomes.lead: Cohi converts your lender DNA and production data into critical, forward-looking executive intelligence:

items.text: Identify the causes of margin pressure.
Identifying profitability opportunities to positively impact your business.
Modeling the Future with Actionable Proforma financials.

outcomes.closing1: Cohi is built around your operational model, your risk appetite, and your growth strategy.
outcomes.closing2: Cohi doesn't standardize you.  It amplifies you and your unique business model.

about.sectionLead: A structured framework for ranking and coaching loan officer performance—so lenders can align compensation to results and invest where it matters.

panels.title: The 200+ BP Performance Gap
panels.tagline: $4.6M total revenue. 56 LOs. Only 7 in the Top Tier.
panels.copy: Revenue by Loan Officer tells the real story: a massive spread between your best and worst producers. Without structured ranking, your top performers go unrecognized and compensation stays disconnected from actual results.

panels.title: Rank Every LO in Real Time
panels.tagline: One dashboard. Every metric that matters.
panels.copy: TopTiering® Comparison gives you the full picture—revenue, units, BPS—ranked high to low across every loan officer. Filter by time period, switch between branch and LO views, and see exactly who drives production and who needs support.

panels.title: Drill Down to Every LO
panels.tagline: Revenue, units, BPS—per loan officer, on mobile.
panels.copy: Managers can pull up any loan officer's performance on their phone. See revenue contribution, unit volume, and basis points side by side. Spot gaps instantly and turn every 1:1 into a targeted coaching conversation backed by real data.

panels.title: See the Tiers. Align the Comp.
panels.tagline: Top Tier: $2.2M · Second Tier: $1.5M · Bottom Tier: $950K
panels.copy: 7 Top Tier LOs produce $2.2M at $308K avg revenue and 41 avg units. 35 Bottom Tier LOs produce $950K at $27K avg. When you see the tiers clearly, compensation conversations shift from volume to value—retain top talent and reduce costly turnover.

contact.heading: We'd love to work with you
contact.lead: Get in touch. We're here to help you see the full picture.
contact.messageLabel: What can we do for you?

footer.disclaimer: Results may vary by user and circumstances. Consult qualified professionals for advice specific to your situation.
